passes.title: American Repertory Theater at Harvard University
passes.benefit_text:
64 Brattle Street, Cambridge, Massachusetts, 02138
                                                            
    Map
617-547-8300
SELECT SHOWS - The A.R.T. makes passes available to select performances of select shows. Availability will be determined 30 days before the start of each performance's run.
Next show: Black Swan, May 29 - June 28, 2026
Each pass admits 2 people for free for either a Friday 7:30 pm performance or a Sunday 2:00 pm performance.
After booking, you will receive an email confirmation with instructions on how to contact A.R.T. Ticket Services for your electronic tickets. Please note that you must contact them no later than 5:00 pm two days before your selected performance.
NOTE: Black Swan is recommended for at least ages 14 and older and has content warnings for self-injury/harm, sex, haze, flashing lights/strobe, and loud sudden noises. For more information, please visit: https://americanrepertorytheater.org/shows-events/black-swan/
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.

passes.title: Boston By Foot
passes.benefit_text:
87 Mount Vernon Street, Boston, MA, 02108
                                                            
    Map
617-367-2345
SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits up to 1 adult or 1 child for free.
Visit www.bostonbyfoot.org to browse Boston By Foot's extensive public tour calendar. Passes are valid for all public walking tours; they are not valid for private tours, water-based tours, or annual celebration tours (Beacon Hill with a BOO! & Footloose on the Freedom Trail).
No passes are available at this time.

308 Congress St., Boston, MA, 02210
                                                            
    Map
617-426-6500
Each pass admits up to 4 (adults or children) at half price per person.
Library Coupons are not valid for Sunday afternoons (Admission is $1 per person on Sundays from 1:30 p.m. to 4:30 p.m.).
This pass is valid only on the date printed on the pass.

100 Cambridgeside Pl, Cambridge, MA, 02141

617-621-3001
SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits 1 person for free. You must pick up your pass at the Main Library.
2026 Season 
Cruises daily May 22-September 7
Mon-Thurs at 12pm, 1:30pm and 3pm
Fri-Sun at 12pm, 1:30pm, 3pm, and 4:30pm
Cruises September 9-27

passes.title: Harvard Museums of Science & Culture
passes.benefit_text:
11 Divinity Ave., Cambridge, MA, 02138
                                                            
    Map
617-496-1638
Each pass admits up to 4 people for free. Passes are valid for one-time use any day through the expiration date listed on the pass.
Note: Harvard Museums of Science & Culture are free to Massachusetts residents every Sunday morning (year-round) from 9:00 am to 12:00 pm and on Wednesdays from 3:00 pm to 5:00 pm. Proof of residency required. This offer is not available to commercial groups.
Physical passes must be picked up from one of the library locations listed in the dropdown menu below. Select your location preference and then pick the dates from the availability calendar.

passes.title: How Do You See the World? Experience + Mapparium™
source_phrases:
210 Massachusetts Ave, Boston, MA, 02115
                                                            
    Map
Each pass admits up to 4 adults free of charge to the Mapparium™ globe in the How Do You See the World? experience (value $6/Adult). Youth 17 and younger are always free.
All other exhibits in the How Do You See the World? experience are always free, as are weekend church tours, and neither require a ticket.
Pass instructions:
Redeem this pass for tickets onsite in the Welcome Hall. Ticket reservations are not available ahead of time.
All Mapparium showtimes are first come, first serve; this pass doesn't guarantee tickets for a specific time or day.
This pass is only valid on the day of your visit.
This pass does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to group visits.
Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
Print out this pass and bring it with you or display it on your phone.
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.

passes.title: Royall House & Slave Quarters
passes.benefit_text:
15 George St., Medford, MA, 02155
                                                            
    Map
781-396-9032
SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits 2 people for free for a 50 minute guided tour.
Tours are at 1:00PM, 2:00PM, and 3:00PM. Visitors are invited to walk the grounds and view the exhibits before and after the tour. Children 12 and younger are admitted free.
After reserving a library pass, you will receive an email confirmation with a promo code.
Please arrive at least 15 minutes before the start of the tour and present your email confirmation with library promo code to the admissions desk staff. All tours are first come first served.
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.

passes.title: Trustees Go Pass
passes.benefit_text:
200 High Street, Boston, MA, 02110
                                                            
    Map
978-921-1944
SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits 2 adults & children under 18 at the Family Level admission rate.
Passes are not date specific and can be used once until the expiration date printed on the pass.
Valid at more than 100 Trustees properties that collect an admission fee (including Fruitlands, deCordova and The Old Manse). Please note that some properties require pre-registration. Information about properties and advance registration available here: https://thetrustees.org/content/passes/
Physical passes must be picked up from one of the library locations listed in the dropdown menu below. Select your location preference and then pick the dates from the availability calendar.

passes.title: USS Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
88 Constitution Road, Boston, MA, 02129
                                                            
    Map
617-426-1812
Each pass allows free admission for up to 5 visitors per day.
Limit one pass per party.  Admission is first come first served, no advance tickets or reservations. Present printed pass or digital pass to Admissions.
Valid only for the reserved date of visit. Ship is open Wednesday-Sunday 10am-4pm and closed Mondays and Tuesdays. Museum is open daily 10am-5pm.
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
